Let me look at the image again - I notice there's a thin orange/yellow bar at the very bottom of the screen. That might be a timer or progress bar.
Let me try clicking on the gray corner decorations of the bottom-right panel frame, since those are unique elements. Or maybe I need to click on the white parts of the cross pattern.
Actually, let me reconsider. The target action count is about 43, which is quite a lot. Maybe I need to click on many cells to change their colors. But clicking didn't change anything...
Let me try clicking on the gray/white cross pattern elements specifically - maybe the white squares.

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 10, 'col': 14}])
